iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"Get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"Inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"Get quick-clay hazard polygons for the high-risk class (value to be chosen from step 2)"},{"step":4,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"Try parcels in Trondheim using kommunenummer filter: parcels with area > 5000 m²"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"Find parcels from step 4 that intersect quick-clay hazard polygons from step 3 (membership filter)"},{"step":6,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"Collapse to one row per parcel (distinct teigid) with its area"},{"step":7,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"Sort parcels by area descending"},{"step":8,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"Limit to top 10 parcels"},{"step":9,"action":"query","database":"fylker","purpose":"Get county polygons to determine which county contains Trondheim municipality"},{"step":10,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"Join municipality (step 1) with counties (step 9) to get the county name for reporting"}]}
